Title: View fulfillment centers list
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
1. Navigate to More > Inventory module
2. Verify Managing fulfillment centers blade opens
Expected Result:
1. Managing fulfillment centers blade is opened
2. Elements present: Refresh button, Add button, Search field, Table with FFCs

Title: Add new fulfillment center
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
1. Navigate to Inventory module
2. Click 'Add' button
3. Verify New Fulfillment Center blade opens with fields: Name, Location, Outer Id, Short description, Description, Address widget
4. Fill in the Name field
5. Verify Save and Reset buttons activate
6. Click Reset > Verify name is cleared and buttons deactivate
7. Fill in all necessary fields
8. Click 'Save'
9. Reopen new FFC
Expected Result:
1. New Fulfillment Center blade opens with correct fields and buttons (Save, Reset, Delete disabled by default)
2. Save and Reset activated after filling Name
3. Reset clears data
4. FFC is created and displayed in the list
5. All fields saved, dynamic properties widget displayed

Title: Edit FFC name
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
FFC created [INV-002]
Steps:
1. Open FFC from INV-002
2. Change the Name field
3. Click 'Save'
4. Reopen FFC blade
Expected Result: New name is saved and displayed

Title: Edit FFC description

FFC created [INV-002]
Steps:

3. Click 'Save'
4. Reopen FFC blade

Title: Edit FFC geo location
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
FFC created [INV-002]
Steps:
1. Open FFC from INV-002

Title: Edit FFC short description with Markdown and HTML
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
FFC created [INV-002]
Steps:
1. Open FFC > Check Short Description field
2. Add information > Click Save
3. Close and reopen FFC blade > Verify data persisted
4. Use Markdown toolbar to edit text > Save
5. Open Preview tab > Verify formatted text
6. Return to Markdown tab > Add HTML table > Save
7. Open Preview tab > Verify HTML table renders
Expected Result:
1. Information saved in Short description field
2. Text displayed as edited in Markdown
3. HTML file displayed as table in Preview tab

Title: Delete FFC from details blade
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
FFC created [INV-002]
Steps:
1. Open FFC details
2. Click 'Delete' button
3. Confirm deletion
Expected Result: FFC is deleted and count decreases by one

Title: Delete FFC via context menu
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
FFC created [INV-002]
Steps:
1. Open Inventory > Right-click on any FFC
2. Verify context menu displays 'Manage' and 'Delete'
3. Click 'Delete'
4. Confirm deletion in pop-up
Expected Result: FFC is deleted and count decreases by one

Title: Search fulfillment centers
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Multiple FFCs exist
Steps:
1. Enter full name of FFC (e.g. 'Los Angeles Branch') > Verify result
2. Clear search field > Verify all FFCs returned
3. Enter partial name (e.g. 'New') > Verify matching results
4. Enter non-existing name > Verify no results
Expected Result:
1. Full name returns exact match
2. Clearing returns all FFCs
3. Partial name returns matching FFCs
4. Non-existing name returns no results

Title: Add address to FFC
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
FFC created [INV-002]
Steps:
1. Open FFC > Click on Address widget
2. Verify Edit address blade opens with fields: Country, State/Province, City, Address line 1, Zip code, Email, Phone
3. Fill in Country field > Verify Ok button activates
4. Fill in remaining fields
5. Click Ok > Save
6. Reopen FFC blade > Verify address on widget
Expected Result:
1. Edit address blade opens with correct fields
2. Country field is required, Ok activates after filling it
3. Address created and displayed on widget
4. Address persists after reopening

Title: Update FFC address
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
FFC with address [INV-010]
Steps:
1. Open FFC > Address widget
2. Change content of address fields
3. Click Ok > Save
4. Reopen FFC blade > Verify address widget
Expected Result: Changed address is displayed and saved on the widget

Title: Delete FFC address
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
FFC with address [INV-010]
Steps:
1. Open FFC > Address widget
2. Click 'Delete'
3. Confirm deletion
4. Verify widget shows 'No address'
Expected Result: Address is deleted. 'No address' displayed on widget

Title: View dynamic properties
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
FFC exists
Steps:
1. Open any FFC details page
2. Click on Dynamic properties widget
3. Verify Dynamic Properties blade opens
Expected Result:
1. Number of properties displayed on widget
2. Blade opens with buttons: Ok, Cancel, Reset, Types of properties, Hide empty fields
3. Field with Properties values displayed

Title: Add dynamic property to FFC
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
FFC exists
Steps:
1. Open FFC > Dynamic properties widget > Types of properties
2. Verify blade with list of dynamic properties opens
3. Click 'Add'
4. Enter Property name
5. Choose property type (Multivalue, Multilanguage, Dictionary)
6. Choose Value type from drop-down
7. Click 'Create'
Expected Result: New property added to list. Number of properties increased by one on widget

Title: Set dynamic property value
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Dynamic property added [INV-014]
Steps:
1. Open FFC > Dynamic properties widget
2. Set value for property
3. Click Ok > Save
Expected Result: Value saved. Ok button activates when value entered

Title: Update dynamic property
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Dynamic property with value [INV-015]
Steps:
1. Open FFC > Dynamic properties widget > Types of properties
2. Click on property > Change name > Save
3. Change property value > Save
Expected Result: Property name is updated. Property value is updated

Title: Delete dynamic property
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Dynamic property exists
Steps:
1. Open FFC > Dynamic properties widget > Types of properties
2. Click on property > Delete
3. Confirm deletion
Expected Result: Property deleted and no longer displayed. Number of properties decreased on widget

Title: Edit in stock quantity
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Product with inventory exists
Steps:
1. Open Catalog > Product > Fulfillment centers widget
2. Open FFC > Change 'In stock' value
3. Click 'Save'
4. Verify new value in table
Expected Result:
1. New 'In stock' value is saved
2. 'In stock' value in the table is updated

Title: Order product > stock qty decreased
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Product with 'In stock' qty > 1
Track inventory = TRUE
Steps:
1. Note current 'In stock' qty = X in Backend
2. Go to Storefront > Order product (qty = 1)
3. Return to Backend > Check 'In stock' value
Expected Result: 'In stock' qty = X - 1 (initial quantity minus ordered)

Title: Order more items than available in FFC
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Only default FFC for store
Track inventory = TRUE
Steps:
1. Go to Backend > Set 'In stock' to X
2. Go to Storefront > Add product to cart
3. Change quantity to X+1
4. Verify warning message
5. Change quantity back to X
6. Verify warning disappears
Expected Result:
1. Warning: 'Product quantity exceeded! Available quantity is: X'
2. Warning disappears when qty = X, can order

Title: Available items from multiple FFCs
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Store has default FFC and at least one available FFC
Track inventory = TRUE
Steps:
1. Go to Backend > Set default FFC 'In stock' = X
2. Set available FFC 'In stock' = Y
3. Go to Storefront > Add product to cart
4. Set quantity to X+Y > Verify no warning
5. Set quantity to X+Y+1 > Verify warning
Expected Result:
1. No warning at qty X+Y — can order
2. Warning: 'Product quantity exceeded! Available quantity is: X+Y'

Title: In stock = 0 > item unavailable
Preconditions:
Track inventory = TRUE
Product 'In stock' = 0
Steps:
1. Go to Storefront
2. Navigate to product with zero stock
3. Verify product availability
Expected Result:
1. 'Add to cart' button inactive in details view
2. No 'Add to cart' button in list view
3. 'Sold out' label on item image

Title: Add to cart > Update inventory > Create order validation
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Product with inventory
Steps:
1. Add product to cart on Storefront
2. Update inventory on Backend (reduce to 0)
3. Try to create order
Expected Result: Validation error displayed

Title: Track inventory = FALSE
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Only default FFC for store
Steps:
1. Go to Backend > Product > Switch off 'Track inventory' checkbox
2. Set 'In stock' = X in default FFC
3. Go to Storefront > Order product (qty < X)
4. Return to Backend > Verify 'In stock' still = X
5. Go to Storefront > Set cart qty > X
Expected Result:
1. 'In stock' value unchanged (still X)
2. No warning message — can order qty higher than X

Title: Track inventory = TRUE
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Only default FFC for store
Steps:
1. Go to Backend > Product > Switch on 'Track inventory' checkbox
2. Set 'In stock' = X in default FFC
3. Go to Storefront > Order product (qty < X)
4. Return to Backend > Verify 'In stock' = X - ordered qty
5. Go to Storefront > Set cart qty > X
Expected Result:
1. 'In stock' = X - ordered quantity
2. Warning: 'Product quantity exceeded! Available quantity is: X'

Title: Add FFC with outerId via API
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Swagger API accessible
Steps:
1. Send POST /api/inventory/fulfillmentcenters/batch with body:
[{"name": "MyTest1", "outerId": "mytest1"}]
2. Verify response
Expected Result: Status 200 returned. FFC is created with outerId

Title: Update FFC outerId via API
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
FFC with outerId created [INV-029]
Steps:
1. Send POST /api/inventory/fulfillmentcenters/batch or PUT /api/inventory/fulfillmentcenters with updated outerId
2. Verify response
Expected Result: Status 200 returned. OuterId is updated

Title: Settings > Tooltips show/hide behavior
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
1. Open Settings > Inventory > General blade
2. Verify all tooltips are folded
3. Click blue question mark for field1 > Verify tooltip unfolds
4. Click blue question mark for field2 > Verify field2 unfolds and field1 folds
5. Click 'Hide' link > Verify all tooltips fold
Expected Result: All tooltips behave correctly: one at a time, folding/unfolding as expected

Title: Settings > Export/Import page size
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Admin on Settings panel
Steps:
1. Open Settings > Inventory > General
2. Change 'The page size being used for Export/Import' value (e.g. 1)
3. Click Save
4. Open Export & Import page > Export blade
5. Choose VirtoCommerce.Inventory
6. Click 'Start Export'
7. Verify progress bar updates with setting value
Expected Result: Changes saved. Progress bar updates with values from setting

Title: Settings > Enable log inventory changes
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
1. Open Settings > Inventory > General
2. Enable 'Log inventory changes'
3. Click Save
4. Open Catalog > Product > Fulfillment centers widget > Any FFC
5. Change 'In stock' value > Save
6. Check PlatformOperationLog table
Expected Result: Setting saved as enabled. New row was added to PlatformOperationLog

Title: Settings > Disable log inventory changes
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
1. Open Settings > Inventory > General
2. Disable 'Log inventory changes'
3. Click Save
4. Open Catalog > Product > Fulfillment centers widget > Any FFC
5. Change 'In stock' value > Save
6. Check PlatformOperationLog table
Expected Result: Setting saved as disabled. New row was NOT added to PlatformOperationLog

Title: Settings > Enable event-based indexation
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
1. Open Settings > Inventory > Search
2. Enable 'Enable event-based indexation for inventory entities'
3. Click Save > Restart
4. Open Catalog > Product > Fulfillment Centers widget
5. Change 'In stock' value > Save
6. Reopen edit blade > Check Indexation widget
Expected Result: Setting saved as enabled. System was reindexed after saving change

Title: Settings > Disable event-based indexation
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
1. Open Settings > Inventory > Search
2. Disable 'Enable event-based indexation for inventory entities'
3. Click Save > Restart
4. Open Catalog > Product > Fulfillment Centers widget
5. Change 'In stock' value > Save
6. Reopen edit blade > Check Indexation widget
Expected Result: Setting saved as disabled. System doesn't index after saving change
